column1: # Prism internal species ID -> display name, extracted directly from the
# real v0.95 Hotfix 5 ROM at file offset 0x0155E5, fixed 10-byte-per-record
# table (name padded with $50 terminator to 10 bytes; exact-10-letter names
# have no terminator byte at all). Verified 2026-07-12: this is Prism's OWN
# species dex order, NOT vanilla Crystal's/pokecrystal's National-Dex order
# (e.g. Prism inserts Chingling/Chimecho at 13/14 where Crystal has
# Weedle/Kakuna/Beedrill) - so pokecrystal ids must NOT be used as a stand-in
# for Prism ids even for shared Gen 1/2 species. 255 entries (1-255, single-
# byte species id field), ending at the same Egg(253)/Debug(255) placeholder
# pattern vanilla Crystal uses. See docs/TOOLCHAIN.md for the extraction method.
